name: NIX.SK Route Servers
notes:
Route servers:

* skrs1.nix.cz - 194.30.187.1, 2001:7f8:91::11
* skrs2.nix.cz - 194.30.187.2, 2001:7f8:91::12

Looking glass is available on the link https://birdspy.nix.cz for registered users only.

Route redistribution control and blackholing:

* (0:<Peer ASN>), (47627:0:<Peer ASN>), (rt:0:<Peer ASN>) - Do not advertise to <Peer ASN>

* (47627:<Peer ASN>), (47627:47627:<Peer ASN>), (rt:47627:<Peer ASN>) - Announce to <Peer ASN>

* (0:47627), (47627:0:47627), (rt:0:47627) - Do not announce anywhere

* 65535:666 BLACKHOLE

More technical info available on https://confluence.nix.cz
